## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy, publishing plans, and collaboration between Webstacks and GrowthX for ongoing content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [10 new articles ready for publishing, with 7 existing articles in draft stage due to a website bug](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Content strategy focuses on non-technical, marketer-oriented topics, emphasizing business value over technical details](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Team to implement content refreshes (5-10 articles/week) for underperforming content to boost SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Downloadable assets (e.g., "Best B2B SaaS Websites" ebook, Headless CMS checklist) are crucial for lead generation and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing and Bug Resolution

  - [10 new articles ready for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [7 existing articles in draft stage due to a website bug](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Team to resolve the bug and plan for publishing next week](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Emphasis on maintaining clear communication to avoid delays](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)

### Content Strategy and Voice

  - [Current articles align well with desired voice and tone](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Plan to develop unique voices for different authors (e.g., executive-level vs. general team members)](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Focus on non-technical, marketer-oriented content](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Utilize persona-driven pages and use cases for topic inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Aim to simplify complex topics for the primary audience (marketers)](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)

### Keyword Strategy and Content Templates

  - [Initial 50 topics developed based on competitor research, keyword analysis, and client input](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Content templates introduced to create in-depth topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Strategy aims to position Webstacks as an authority on specific topics](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Team to review and provide feedback on proposed topics](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

### Content Refresh Initiative

  - [Proposal to refresh 5-10 underperforming articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Focus on articles with impressions but no clicks in the past 3-6 months](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Demonstrated success with other clients (e.g., Arena) showing immediate ranking improvements](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Team to identify suitable articles for refresh or removal](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)

### Downloadable Assets and CTAs

  - [Inventory of existing downloadable assets shared for reference](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - ["Best B2B SaaS Websites" ebook and Headless CMS implementation checklist identified as top-performing assets](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Plan to incorporate relevant CTAs and conversion panels in new and refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Focus on driving traffic to these high-value assets for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Resolve website bug to enable publishing of drafted articles](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Review and provide feedback on proposed content topics and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Share examples of desired voice/tone for different author personas](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Begin implementing content refresh initiative for underperforming articles](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Incorporate relevant CTAs and downloadable assets into new and refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Maintain open communication to address any blockers or questions promptly](https://fathom.video/share/Tw3gb_TY3_e1sm-Mq4PYKSS6WzKLMgS_?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
